verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Christ is greater than all my troubles By His grace I'll overcome Christ is greater than all my sins At Calvary my Saviour won Though the oppositions maybe tall He will always rescue me when I call.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God always keep His Word He always comes to my needs Jesus Christ keeps all His appointments to His Bride Jesus projects His Love His sovereign grace steps in He is so faithful, He is so faithful to his Bride

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was living dead in trespass But Christ took me in Christ washed me white as snow The oil and wine HE put in Now I'm branded by the Holy Ghost No man can take away from HIM

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I may not be what I ought to But I'm not what I used to be He's sure I'll come when He call Trusting fully He'll finish my all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God always keep His Word He always comes to my needs Jesus Christ keeps all His appointments to His Bride Jesus projects His Love His sovereign grace steps in He is so faithful, He is so faithful, He is so faithful to his Bride
